title: Odyssey, Book 24: Peace
introduction: Book 24 of the Odyssey: Peace. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Ἑρμῆς δὲ ψυχὰς Κυλλήνιος ἐξεκαλεῖτο ἀνδρῶν μνηστήρων.
translation.text: Hermes led the souls of the suitors down to Hades. Odysseus went to his father Laertes in the country and revealed himself. The suitors' families sought revenge, but Athena intervened. She commanded peace, and Odysseus was king of Ithaca again.
